nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when no more items

actorId.description: UUID of the user who triggered this activity

actorName.description: Resolved display name (email prefix as fallback; never full email)

subtitle.description: Optional second line with more context

title.description: Human-readable title for UI display; always present

canAct.description: Whether the notification still supports actionable buttons (accept/decline).

data.description: Opaque payload preserved for backward compatibility.

recentForm.description: Last up-to-5 confirmed match results from the player perspective. Newest first. W=win, L=loss, D=draw.

recomputeTriggered.description: true when standings recompute was executed; false when skipped after non-blocking failure

status.description: Final persisted status. Idempotent behavior: if already resolved, returns current final status.

dateRangeEnabled.description: Alias for enabling date-based league scheduling. If true, both startDate and endDate are required.

isPermanent.description: When true, league does not require a date range. Backward compatible with legacy clients sending only dates.

computedStatus.description: Computed status that normalizes legacy rows using membersCount fallback.

mode.description: Legacy mode field (kept for backward compatibility). Use modeKey.

status.description: Legacy status field (kept for backward compatibility). Use statusKey.

participants.description: Participants in display order (teamA then teamB)

expiresAt.description: V1 currently does not expire confirmations

participants.description: Resolved participants in display order (teamA then teamB), for stable UI rendering.

sets.description: Legacy field kept for backward compatibility. Use score.sets.

opponentName.description: Stable opponent display label. Never empty.

playedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the match was played

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when no more items

displayName.description: Display name for UI labels. Never a raw email.

opponentName.description: Legacy singles-friendly opponent label derived relative to the viewer.

competitive.description: Null when the player has no competitive profile.

reasonDetails.description: Structured semantic errors for UX messaging.

summary.example: Subiste 2 posiciones desde el ultimo snapshot

opponentSummary.description: Human-readable opponent summary. For doubles: "vs Juan + Pedro".

result.description: Match result from the perspective of the queried player.

recomputeTriggered.description: true when standings recompute was executed; false when skipped after non-blocking failure

status.description: Final persisted status. Idempotent behavior: if already resolved, returns current final status.

sets.description: Best-of-3 score. 2 sets for straight wins (2-0), optional 3rd set when split (1-1).

teamA2Id.description: Optional for singles. For doubles, send both teamA2Id and teamB2Id.

teamB2Id.description: Optional for singles. For doubles, send both teamA2Id and teamB2Id.

details.description: Optional context payload to make the error actionable.

message.example: Set your city to use competitive features

tbA.description: Optional tiebreak games won by team A in this set

tbB.description: Optional tiebreak games won by team B in this set

avatarUrl.description: Alias of url for compatibility with mobile clients

mediaAssetId.description: Existing media asset UUID. If provided, avatarUrl is resolved from the media asset.

url.description: Direct avatar URL (fallback when not using media assets)

delta.description: oldPosition - newPosition; positive means moved up; null = new player

displayName.description: Resolved display name; falls back to "Jugador {position}"

lastWinAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the player's most recent win

oldPosition.description: Position in the immediately preceding snapshot

computedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last computed snapshot; null if no snapshot yet

lastUpdatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the latest standings snapshot row update.

snapshotVersion.description: Current standings read-model version; additive metadata for clients that want snapshot freshness.

avatarUrl.description: Alias of url for compatibility with mobile clients

mediaAssetId.description: Existing media asset UUID. If provided, avatarUrl is resolved from the media asset.

url.description: Direct avatar URL (fallback when not using media assets)

parameters.description: Compatibility flag. Use legacy=1 to return a plain array instead of the canonical wrapper.

200.description: Canonical wrapper by default. Legacy clients can request a plain array with legacy=1.

get.summary: List current user matches. Canonical contract returns { items, nextCursor }.

get.description: Use GET /notifications/inbox for the canonical actions inbox.
Use GET /notifications for feed history or GET /notifications/inbox for actionable items.

get.summary: General notifications feed (history). For actionable notifications, use /notifications/inbox.
Canonical actions inbox (invites, challenges, pending confirmations) with action metadata.
List my favorite player ids (most recent first)

delete.summary: Remove a player from my favorites

post.summary: Add a player to my favorites

get.description: Returns the public full-page competitive profile for a given player, including career totals, ranking positions, streaks and recent activity. Use GET /players/:id/competitive-summary for compact scouting/hover-card data such as recent form, strengths and recent match previews. This endpoint intentionally overlaps only on core identity and top-level competitive indicators.

Returns a compact, UI-ready competitive snapshot for a given player. Includes ELO, category, recent form, top strengths/endorsements and last confirmed matches. Use this for scouting hover cards, compact quick previews and ranking list context. For a public full-page profile, use GET /players/:id/competitive-profile. All sections that lack data return null/empty and are never invented.

204.description: No avatar available for this user

get.description: Returns ranking movement events relevant to the authenticated user, ordered newest first. This is a cursor-paginated feed with a hard limit cap of 20 items per request.

parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 20. Defaults to 20.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous page.
parameters.name: cursor
